mapper.select: SELECT * FROM housekeeping_task ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM housekeeping_task WHERE room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM housekeeping_task WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO housekeeping_task (room_id, task_type, priority, status, notes) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{taskType}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{notes})
mapper.update: UPDATE housekeeping_task SET status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
